name: car_w
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "A vibrant red convertible with a black fabric top parked on a paved driveway, blending vintage 1950s styling with modern automotive design. Prominent chrome front bumpers, circular headlights set in silver-rimmed housings, and dual chrome hood ornaments mirror the sharp flared tailfins at the rear. Modern five-spoke alloy wheels with low-profile tires sit beneath the body; a silver trim strip runs along the side profile, ending near a small 'SS' badge on the rear quarter panel.
